text.message: Well obviously you weren't good at it since he left you
Alyssa puts Ethan in a chastity belt when Riley’s around
Have you ever seen Ethan’s eyes do a full 360? I have when I’ve been with him
Dude you wish you did that maybe he would have stayed then
I’ve been with him so much more than you why do you think he farts so much
He facts so much because he's stinky
Don't act like im not a tight little flower still
He married Alyssa tho not you 🤔
I have paper that says he's mine
Hands on sight Riley for blocking our 10
I didn’t even choose that one
I was to busy talking about my hubbys right booty whole
You wish he was your hubby lost that chance
Oof Ethan said he wouldn’t say that
Alyssa you have to put him in his place
